name: review-pack
description: Review and compliance workflows: code review, security scan, quality gates, approval chains.
author: Agent Swarm

skills.name: SecurityScan
skills.principle: Check for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities. Report severity (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) with file:line references.
skills.when_to_apply: security, vulnerability, injection, auth, OWASP, scan

skills.name: CodeQualityCheck
skills.principle: Identify code smells, duplicated logic, missing error handling, and test coverage gaps.
skills.when_to_apply: code quality, smell, duplicate, error handling, coverage

skills.name: ComplianceCheck
skills.principle: Verify adherence to coding standards, naming conventions, and documentation requirements.

skills.name: FixSuggestion
skills.principle: Provide minimal, targeted fixes with before/after code. Explain why the fix is needed.

ontology_terms.label: Security Scan
ontology_terms.definition: Scan for security vulnerabilities and misconfigurations

ontology_terms.label: Quality Check
ontology_terms.definition: Check code quality, patterns, and best practices

ontology_terms.label: Compliance Check
ontology_terms.definition: Verify adherence to standards and policies

ontology_terms.label: Review Report
ontology_terms.definition: Structured review findings with severity and recommendations

ontology_terms.label: Fix Plan
ontology_terms.definition: Prioritized list of fixes with before/after code

competency_questions: What security vulnerabilities exist in this code?
Does this code meet quality standards?
